creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Submitter has gave me the source code, which seems to be using LDAPv2 
API, causing warnings like: 
* implicit declaration of function 'ldap_init' 
* cast to pointer from integer of different size 
* implicit declaration of function 'ldap_search_s' 
etc. 

In order to use these deprecated APIs, the developer has to define 
LDAP_DEPRECATED when compling legacy code.  A better way to solve this 
is to modify the program to use LDAPv3 API. 

Mark this PR as closed as APIs were deprecated and we do not intend 
to revert the upstream decision.
